title: ux-PasswordField
text: ux-PasswordField This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-PasswordField properties. ux-PasswordField widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-PasswordField Maps to physical widget: uxTextField of type password Default definition: ux-PasswordField=uxTextField(html:type=password) Supported triggers: onchange Use for: String fields whose content must be hidden. Related Links uxtextfield The uxtextfield widget is a single-line text input control. It allows entry of various formats of single-line text, including plain text, text according to a certain pattern, date, tel, email, password, and URL. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
